Cine Portal: calor em cartaz. haight.com.br

Portal. (sm) 1. Abertura ou porta de entrada principal. 2. Um meio de acesso para a próxima realidade. O cinema é um portal — entre tempos, entre histórias, entre quem fomos, somos e podemos ser. Nas telas, memórias ganham forma e força, criam novas narrativas e se expandem para além da ficção. O cinema nacional projeta um Brasil pulsante e vivo. Matéria-prima para nós e para tantas outras. Com Cine Portal, convidamos você a ocupar esse espaço com orgulho. Celebramos a arte e a cultura como territórios essenciais, acreditando que histórias projetadas também projetam futuros. fotografia @brunasussekind assistente de fotografia @guidodowsley_ @eloypk modelos @adamsgabi @_grazimuniz direção de arte @raphael_tepedino filmmaker @brunasozzi edição de vídeo @brunasozzi stylist @jujubonjour assistente stylist @padillamanu beleza @tailimabeauty, @julianarodriguesmua & @mariananunesk  produção executiva @duarteanna_ @geraldoprjr @adriano_valente @oppose._ estilo @mahfranklin, @thidú, @julianatoller, @carolpin & @coucou.carolina ateliê @mariaterezadasnevesmarques, Aline Negrin, Linda Roffe & Raquel Saraiva marketing e branding Haight @beatrxzgm, @fonsecaxjulia, @larawalverde, @larissenes, @dearagaoleticia, @lochifarelli & @ninaamarante agradecimentos especiais @alexia.kronig @bernardopraguer @coucou.carolina @filipefilipefilipef @mariaterezadasnevesmarques Maria Dartora Roffé @lcsprszz @pedrocunhapedro @scorpionsznisforever @vacomtudo @vivisnarciso equipamentos @oliverequipamentos

entity_data.img_caption:
The image is a promotional advertisement for a sale event. The background of the image features a dark, textured fabric with a subtle pattern that resembles a woven or knitted material. The texture gives the impression of a high-quality, possibly premium fabric.

Prominently displayed across the center of the image is the word "SALE" in large, bold, white capital letters. This text stands out against the dark background, making it easily noticeable and drawing immediate attention to the offer being advertised.

Below the word "SALE," there is additional text in smaller white capital letters. The text reads: "ATÉ 50% OFF EM PEÇAS SELECIONADAS + 10% OFF CUPOM 10EXTRA." This translates to "Up to 50% off on selected pieces + 10% off with coupon 10EXTRA."

At the bottom right corner of the image, there is a small rectangular logo or brand tag. The logo consists of a black rectangle with white text inside it. The text within the logo is not fully legible due to the resolution and size, but it appears to be part of the brand's identity.

The overall design of the advertisement is minimalist and modern, focusing on clear communication of the sale details without any distracting elements. The use of a dark background with a subtle pattern helps to highlight the white text, ensuring that the information is easily readable and visually appealing.

In summary, the image is a straightforward promotional poster for a sale event, featuring a dark textured background, bold white text for the sale announcement, and a small brand logo at the bottom. The text provides specific details about the discount offers available during the sale.

The image features a person standing against a plain, light-colored background. The individual is wearing a red bikini set, consisting of a matching top and bottom. The top has thin straps and a scoop neckline, while the bottom is a high-waisted style with a thong back. The person has their hands on their hips and is looking directly at the camera. The word "SALE" is prominently displayed twice, once on each side of the person's torso, indicating that the image is likely part of a promotional or advertising campaign for a sale event. The overall aesthetic is simple and minimalistic, focusing on the clothing and the message of the sale.

The person's posture is straight, with their arms relaxed at their sides. The lighting in the image is soft and even, highlighting the details of the swimsuit and the person's figure. The word "SALE" is prominently displayed twice on either side of the person, indicating that the image is likely part of a promotional advertisement for a sale event.

The image is a black-and-white photograph featuring a woman standing in front of a building with architectural elements that include arched windows and balconies. The building has a Mediterranean or Spanish architectural style, characterized by its white walls and tiled roofs. 

The woman is positioned on the ground level, slightly to the right side of the image, and appears to be wearing a dark dress. She is facing the camera, and her posture suggests she might be posing for the photograph. Her hair is long and dark, and she seems to be looking directly at the camera.

The building behind her has multiple levels. The uppermost level features a balcony with a metal railing, and there is a window with a rectangular shape above it. Below this, there is another window with an arched top, which is part of the building's facade. Further down, there is another arched window, and below that, there is a rectangular window with bars. The lower part of the building has a series of arches, creating a patterned effect on the wall.

The ground in front of the building is made of stone tiles, and there is a small step leading up to the entrance of the building. The overall scene gives a sense of a quiet, possibly residential area, with the woman adding a human element to the otherwise static and architectural setting.

The image features a person wearing a red bikini set. The top is a halter-style bikini top with thin straps, and the bottom is a high-waisted bikini bottom. The person has a natural, minimalist hairstyle and is standing against a plain background.
